title: Low Fire - Heycronus
description: Enhance your gameplay experience with the "Low Fire" texture pack. This pack reduces the height of the fire animation, ensuring that it doesn't obstruct your view when your character is on fire.
body:
![Before x After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d54baea0f06511fe46b239706b398739d71b546d.png)

Enhance your gameplay experience with the "Low Fire" texture pack. This pack reduces the height of the fire animation, ensuring that it doesn't obstruct your view when your character is on fire.

The "Low Fire" texture pack is designed to improve visibility during intense gameplay moments. By lowering the height of the fire animation, this pack minimizes the visual distraction when your character catches fire. Whether you're exploring dangerous Nether fortresses or battling fierce mobs, "Low Fire" ensures that you maintain a clear view of your surroundings.

Key Features:
- Reduced fire animation height for better visibility.
- Optimized for both single-player and multiplayer experiences.
- Ideal for PvP and survival gameplay, where every moment counts.
- Compatible with most Minecraft versions.

Keep your focus on the adventure ahead with "Low Fire," and never let flames get in the way of your vision again!

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
